text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ Fars News has released fresh footage of the safe shipping route in the Strait of Hormuz. All transit proceeds under full authorization of the Islamic Republic of Iran. Inbound ships enter the Persian Gulf between Larak and Qeshm islands, while outbound vessels exit south of Larak. This is a secure corridor — passage is strictly permitted by Iran. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 法尔斯通讯社发布了霍尔木兹海峡安全航运路线的最新画面。所有过境运输均在伊朗伊斯兰共和国的全面授权下进行。入境船只在拉拉克岛和格什姆岛之间进入波斯湾，而出境船只则从拉拉克岛以南驶出。这是一条安全走廊——通行严格由伊朗许可。 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷Reuters: Pakistani Army Chief Munir told U.S. President Trump that the U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz was a hurdle to peace talks resuming. Trump responded by saying that he would consider Munir's advice. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 The Hill: U.S. President Trump denied that Pakistani Army Chief Munir had recommended anything in terms of the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. Trump also disagreed with U.S. Energy Secretary Wright's assessment that gas prices might not drop until next year. “No, I think he’s wrong on that. Totally wrong." He continued that gas prices will begin to fall as soon as the situation with Iran is over. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷路透社：巴基斯坦陆军参谋长穆尼尔告诉美国总统特朗普，美国对霍尔木兹海峡的封锁是恢复和平谈判的障碍。特朗普回应称，他会考虑穆尼尔的建议。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 国会山报：美国总统特朗普否认巴基斯坦陆军参谋长穆尼尔就封锁霍尔木兹海峡一事提出过任何建议。特朗普还不同意美国能源部长赖特关于油价可能要到明年才会下跌的评估。“不，我认为他在这一点上错了。完全错了。”他继续表示，一旦伊朗局势结束，油价就会开始下跌。 @wfwitness

text: 🇰🇼 BREAKING! Kuwait Petroleum Corporation has declared force majeure on all crude oil and refined product shipments after Iran's blockade of the Strait of Hormuz made exports impossible. KPC CEO Sheikh Nawaf al-Sabah called the situation "beyond catastrophic," warning it will trigger a domino effect across the global economy. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇰🇼 突发！科威特石油公司宣布，由于伊朗对霍尔木兹海峡的封锁导致出口无法进行，该公司已对所有原油和成品油运输宣布不可抗力。科威特石油公司首席执行官纳瓦夫·萨巴赫亲王称局势“极其灾难性”，并警告称这将引发全球经济的连锁反应。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇦🇪 🇮🇷 The United Arab Emirates has dismantled a alleged organisation that was planning to destabilise "national security and unity." Investigations allegedly revealed the cell’s links to Iran’s “Wilayat al‑Faqih” and to "extremist ideologies." Members allegedly held secret meetings inside and outside the UAE to "recruit young Emiratis, collect funds illegally, and incite against the state’s foreign and domestic policies." The group allegedly also planned to carry out systematic "terrorist acts." A list of 27 alleged suspects was published. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇦🇪 🇮🇷 阿拉伯联合酋长国捣毁了一个涉嫌计划破坏“国家安全与统一”的组织。调查显示，该组织与伊朗的“法基赫监护”以及“极端主义意识形态”有关联。成员涉嫌在阿联酋境内外举行秘密会议，以“招募年轻的阿联酋人、非法筹集资金，并煽动反对国家的内外政策”。该组织还涉嫌计划实施系统的“恐怖主义行为”。一份包含27名涉案嫌疑人的名单已被公布。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇸 🇮🇱 Anti-Hamas police forces were ambushed earlier today in Khan Younis, southern Gaza. They had originally arrived in the area of the Abu Hamid roundabout where they reportedly distributed cigarettes and money to crowds of locals. Moments later, they were ambushed and their vehicle struck by an RPG (media 2). The number of casualties from the confrontation is unknown as of time of writing. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇸 🇮🇱 今天早些时候，反哈马斯警察部队在加沙南部的汗尤尼斯遭到伏击。他们最初抵达阿布哈米德环岛地区，据报道在那里向当地民众分发香烟和金钱。片刻之后，他们遭到伏击，车辆被火箭推进榴弹（RPG）击中（媒体2）。截至发稿时，冲突造成的伤亡人数尚不清楚。 @wfwitness

text: 🇧🇾 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 President of Belarus, Aleksandr Lukashenko: The war in Iran has shown us two things. Firstly, that the United States is not as powerful as expected. Secondly, that people in the Islamic world are willing to sacrifice their lives — unlike me 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇧🇾 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 白俄罗斯总统亚历山大·卢卡申科：伊朗战争向我们展示了两件事。首先，美国并不像预期的那样强大。其次，伊斯兰世界的人民愿意牺牲生命——这与我不同 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇪🇪🇱🇻🇱🇹❌🇸🇰 The three Baltic swamplands have once again denied airspace passage to the plane of Slovakian officials headed by Prime Minister Robert Fico who plan to attend the May 9th victory Day parade in Moscow. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇺🇦 Ukrainian Foreign Minister is of course happy with closing the airspace to Robert Fico, as long as it remains open for their drones. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇪🇪🇱🇻🇱🇹❌🇸🇰 三个波罗的海沼泽国再次拒绝了斯洛伐克官员飞机的领空通行权，这些官员原计划前往莫斯科参加5月9日的胜利日阅兵。🔴 @DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体 | 捐赠 | 广告” 🇺🇦 乌克兰外交部长当然对向罗伯特·菲佐关闭领空感到高兴，只要这片领空对他们的无人机保持开放即可。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇪🇪 🇱🇻 🇱🇹 ❌ 🇸🇰 The three Baltic swamplands have once again denied airspace passage to the plane of Slovakian officials headed by Prime Minister Robert Fico who plan to attend the May 9th victory Day parade in Moscow. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇪🇪 🇱🇻 🇱🇹 ❌ 🇸🇰 三个波罗的海沼泽国再次拒绝了斯洛伐克官员飞机的领空通行权，这些官员原计划前往莫斯科参加5月9日的胜利日阅兵。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) CCTV footage has been released showing a Russian Kinzhal air-launched ballistic missile impacting the ground without detonating somewhere in Ukraine. The missile was reportedly intercepted by the Ukrainian strategic-level electronic warfare system "Lima." According to Cascade Systems, a Ukrainian defence company which developed the EW system, "Lima" has been responsible for the downing of at least 26 Kinzhal missiles since the beginning of 2026. tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）发布了闭路电视录像，显示一枚俄罗斯“匕首”空射弹道导弹在乌克兰某地撞击地面但未爆炸。据报道，该导弹被乌克兰战略级电子战系统“利马”（Lima）拦截。据开发该电子战系统的乌克兰国防公司Cascade Systems称，自2026年初以来，“利马”已负责击落了至少26枚“匕首”导弹。推文

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah parliamentary representative Hassan Fadlallah: "No one, either in Lebanon or abroad, will be able to disarm Hezbollah." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046212258162774431/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）黎巴嫩议会代表哈桑·法德拉拉（Hassan Fadlallah）：“无论是黎巴嫩国内还是国外，没有人能够解除真主党的武装。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046212258162774431/photo/1 推文

text: Nuno Felix Reason 10k for mo rejoining….. If being "brainwashed by Brussels" means young Erasmus Brits speaking new languages, falling in love and discovering their own beautiful continent like we could - aka 𝒏𝒐𝒕 becoming the narrow-minded oinks that read and write this kind of headline 👇 then 𝐛𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐢𝐭 𝐨𝐧 ! https://twitter.com/AlexTaylorNews/status/2046185056788488457/photo/1 - Alex Taylor tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 重新加入的第1万个理由……如果“被布鲁塞尔洗脑”意味着年轻的英国伊拉斯谟学生能说新语言、坠入爱河并像我们曾经那样发现自己美丽的洲——也就是“不”成为那种阅读并撰写此类标题的狭隘猪猡 👇 那么，放马过来吧！ https://twitter.com/AlexTaylorNews/status/2046185056788488457/photo/1 - Alex Taylor 推文

text: Open Source Intel The mixed signals from Tehran point to a deeper issue. This is not just messaging, it reflects a fragmented power structure pulling in different directions. Iran does not operate under a single authority. Power is split between clerical leadership, political institutions, and the IRGC, which often acts independently. What we’re seeing is a system under pressure, with competing factions signaling different paths, negotiation or escalation, with no clear consensus at the top. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）德黑兰发出的混合信号指向了一个更深层次的问题。这不仅仅是信息传递，它反映了一个向不同方向拉扯的碎片化权力结构。伊朗并非在单一权威下运作。权力在神职领导层、政治机构和经常独立行动的伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）之间分配。我们所看到的是一个处于压力下的系统，相互竞争的派系发出了不同的路径信号，无论是谈判还是升级，高层都没有达成明确的共识。推文

text: OSINTdefender Some context on recent reports from Iraq regarding the Iraqi government and competing U.S.-Iranian interests. Iraq-U.S. Dynamic: https://x.com/defensebulletin/status/2023988321802711522?s=46 Comment: U.S.-Iraq-Iran Dynamic (Image via ISW update) 🧵 So the U.S.-Sudani dynamic is actually seriously underreported on. Sudani has long touted his “ability” to keep Iranian-backed militias in check to U.S. decision-makers as a reason for sustained U.S. support for his current role. 1/ - John M. Larrier tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 关于伊拉克政府与美伊利益冲突的近期报道的一些背景。伊拉克-美国动态：https://x.com/defensebulletin/status/2023988321802711522?s=46 评论：美-伊-伊动态（图片来自ISW更新）🧵 实际上，美国与苏达尼（Sudani）之间的动态被严重低估了。苏达尼长期以来一直向美国决策者吹嘘他有“能力”控制伊朗支持的民兵，以此作为美国持续支持他目前角色的理由。1/ - John M. Larrier 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @JillFilipovic : btw I am not "anti-Israel." I'm not an "anti-Zionist," depending on how we're defining the word Zionist (I am like many normie liberals against the settlements, the occupation, and the brutalization of Palestinians, but supportive of a democratic Jewish state). I am a boring-ass two state solution person who thinks both Israelis and Palestinians would be best served by each group coexisting in side-by-side countries. Palestinians are incredibly ill-served by the murderous tyrants of Hamas (to put it very mildly). But if you think Israel is being well-served by its current government... then yeah we very much disagree. tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @JillFilipovic：顺便说一句，我不是“反以色列”。我不是“反犹太复国主义者”，这取决于我们如何定义犹太复国主义者这个词（像许多普通的自由派一样，我反对定居点、占领和对巴勒斯坦人的残酷对待，但支持一个民主的犹太国家）。我是一个无聊的“两国方案”支持者，认为以色列人和巴勒斯坦人如果能在并排的国家中共存，对双方都是最好的。巴勒斯坦人被哈马斯的杀人暴君害得很惨（说得非常委婉）。但如果你认为以色列被其现任政府治理得很好……那么是的，我们非常不同意。推文

text: Open Source Intel Anthropic is restricting deployment of a new AI model called Mythos over its powerful cybersecurity capabilities. The company says it plans to publicly detail the risks the model poses to companies and governments. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046210908217630951/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）Anthropic公司因其强大的网络安全能力，正在限制一种名为Mythos的新型人工智能模型的部署。该公司表示，计划公开详细说明该模型对公司和政府构成的风险。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046210908217630951/photo/1 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @adamSzlapka : Premier @DonaldTusk i Prezydent Emmanuel Macron w Gdańsku 🇵🇱 🇫🇷 Vive la Pologne, vive la France! #PLFR https://twitter.com/adamSzlapka/status/2046189362992287914/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @adamSzlapka：总理 @DonaldTusk 与总统埃马纽埃尔·马克龙在格但斯克 🇵🇱 🇫🇷 Vive la Pologne, vive la France! #PLFR https://twitter.com/adamSzlapka/status/2046189362992287914/video/1 推文

text: Nuno Felix I am gonna insult and preach the Polish Government. Winning strategy. I strongly reject your unfounded, and defamatory statements against the IDF. What you wrote reflects ignorance and a deep lack of understanding. In every war, there are operational accidents, including cases where a military force is harmed by its own fire. Unfortunately, in every war, uninvolved civilians are harmed, especially when terrorists use civilian populations as human shields. However, there is no Western military that fights terrorism more precisely, or on the basis of better intelligence, than the IDF, with a constant effort to minimize civilian casualties. The ratio between terrorist and civilian casualties is better than that of any other Western military. In fact, better than any fighting force in the world. The IDF is a professional and ethical army. For 78 consecutive years, it has faced relentless attempts to eliminate the State of Israel by totalitarian states and some of the most extreme and dangerous terrorist organizations in the world. There is no serious Western democratic military that does not seek to learn from the IDF and its experience. In fact, civilians in European countries also benefit directly from the outcomes of IDF operations. I suggest that instead of preaching morality to others, you personally condemn the disgraceful antisemitic display we saw in the Polish parliament last week. One should be cautious about making irresponsible statements that can ultimately lead to dangerous consequences. - Gideon Sa'ar | גדעון סער tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 我要侮辱并向波兰政府说教。这是制胜策略。我强烈拒绝你们对以色列国防军（IDF）毫无根据的诽谤性声明。你所写的内容反映了无知和深刻的理解匮乏。在每一场战争中，都会发生作战事故，包括军事力量被己方火力伤害的情况。不幸的是，在每一场战争中，无关的平民都会受到伤害，特别是当恐怖分子利用平民作为人盾时。然而，没有哪支西方军队比以色列国防军更精确地打击恐怖主义，或基于更好的情报，并不断努力将平民伤亡降至最低。恐怖分子与平民伤亡的比例优于任何其他西方军队。事实上，比世界上任何战斗力量都要好。以色列国防军是一支专业且有道德的军队。78年来，它一直面临着极权国家和世界上一些最极端、最危险的恐怖组织不断试图消灭以色列国的企图。没有哪支严肃的西方民主国家军队不寻求向以色列国防军及其经验学习。事实上，欧洲国家的平民也直接受益于以色列国防军行动的成果。我建议你不要向别人宣扬道德，而是亲自谴责我们上周在波兰议会看到的令人羞耻的反犹太主义表演。人们应该谨慎发表不负责任的言论，这些言论最终可能导致危险的后果。 - Gideon Sa'ar | גדעון סער 推文

text: Open Source Intel Jordan's Crown Prince Hussein arrived in Doha and met with Qatar's Emir Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani on the first leg of a Gulf solidarity tour. Hussein stressed that "the security of the Arab Gulf states is central to the security and stability of the region." He is expected in Bahrain later today. - Royal Hashemite Court tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）约旦王储侯赛因抵达多哈，并会见了卡塔尔埃米尔塔米姆·本·哈马德·阿勒萨尼，这是他海湾团结之旅的第一站。侯赛因强调，“阿拉伯海湾国家的安全是该地区安全与稳定的核心。”预计他将于今天晚些时候抵达巴林。 - 哈希姆王室法院 推文

text: Open Source Intel Pakistan's interior minister briefed Iran's ambassador on arrangements for upcoming peace talks in Islamabad. Both emphasized a diplomatic solution to ease regional tensions. - N12 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）巴基斯坦内政部长向伊朗大使通报了即将于伊斯兰堡举行的和平谈判的安排。双方都强调通过外交途径缓解地区紧张局势。 - N12 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @sikorskiradek : Dobrze, że minister Sa'ar szybko przeprosił, było za co. Należy ukarać tego żołnierza ale i wyciągnąć wnioski wobec sposobu w jaki są formowani. Żołnierze IDF sami przyznają się do zbrodni wojennych. Zabijali nie tylko cywilnych Palestyńczyków ale nawet własnych zakładników. “Zniszczenie chrześcijańskiego symbolu religijnego przez żołnierza IDF w południowym Libanie jest poważne i haniebne. Pochwalam oświadczenie IDF za potępienie tego incydentu oraz za przeprowadzenie dochodzenia w tej sprawie. Jestem przekonany, że zostaną podjęte odpowiednie, surowe środki wobec osób odpowiedzialnych za ten niedopuszczalny czyn. To wstydliwe działanie jest całkowicie sprzeczne z naszymi wartościami. Izrael jest krajem, który szanuje różne religie i ich święte symbole oraz podtrzymuje tolerancję i wzajemny szacunek między wyznaniami. Przepraszamy za ten incydent oraz wszystkich chrześcijan, których uczucia zostały zranione.” - Minister Spraw Zagranicznych Izraela - Ambasada Izraela tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @sikorskiradek：萨尔部长很快道歉是件好事，确实有道歉的必要。应该惩罚那名士兵，并从他们的训练方式中吸取教训。以色列国防军士兵自己承认犯下了战争罪。他们不仅杀害了巴勒斯坦平民，甚至杀害了自己的人质。“以色列国防军士兵在黎巴嫩南部摧毁基督教宗教象征的行为是严重且可耻的。我赞扬以色列国防军谴责这一事件并对此进行调查的声明。我相信，将对责任人采取适当、严厉的措施。这种可耻的行为完全违背了我们的价值观。以色列是一个尊重不同宗教及其神圣象征，并维护信仰间宽容与相互尊重的国家。我们为这一事件以及所有感情受到伤害的基督徒道歉。” - 以色列外交部长 - 以色列大使馆 推文

text: Open Source Intel Israel and Lebanon will hold their second meeting Thursday in Washington. Ambassador Yechiel Leiter and the Lebanese Ambassador to the U.S. will participate. - Jerusalem Post tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）以色列和黎巴嫩将于周四在华盛顿举行第二次会议。大使耶基尔·莱特（Yechiel Leiter）和黎巴嫩驻美大使将参加。 - 耶路撒冷邮报 推文

text: OSINTdefender The Islamic Revolutionary Guards Corps (IRGC) Quds Force Commander Esmail Qaani visited Baghdad, Iraq to meet with Shi’ite political and militia leaders in the country, amidst the ongoing impasse on the next Iraqi prime minister. This comes as the U.S. has reportedly suspended financial and security cooperation with Iraq, in a move likely meant to apply pressure on Iraqi government as Iran continues to make efforts to deepen their influence within Iraqi security and governance frameworks. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）圣城旅指挥官伊斯梅尔·卡尼（Esmail Qaani）访问了伊拉克巴格达，会见了该国的什叶派政治和民兵领导人，正值下一任伊拉克总理人选陷入僵局之际。此前有报道称，美国已暂停与伊拉克的金融和安全合作，此举很可能是为了在伊朗继续努力加深其在伊拉克安全和治理框架内的影响力时，对伊拉克政府施加压力。推文

text: Open Source Intel IAEA: Japan reports no abnormalities at its nuclear facilities following today's 7.5 magnitude earthquake and tsunami warning. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）国际原子能机构（IAEA）：日本报告称，在今天发生7.5级地震并发布海啸预警后，其核设施没有出现异常。推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @dave_brown24 : In November, Trump dispatched Driscoll to Ukraine to help negotiate a peace deal with Russia. It led to widespread questions within the Pentagon on why Driscoll, and not his boss, Hegseth, was chosen for this task. Hegseth told associates he wanted the White House to take Driscoll off the negotiations. Soon after, Driscoll was temporarily pulled from the high-profile assignment, and many of his press engagements were quashed https://www.wsj.com/politics/national-security/hegseths-feud-with-army-secretary-spills-into-public-view-ee2e5687 @laraseligman @MarcusReports @meridithmcgraw tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @dave_brown24：11月，特朗普派遣德里斯科尔（Driscoll）前往乌克兰，帮助与俄罗斯谈判和平协议。这在五角大楼内部引发了广泛质疑，为什么选择德里斯科尔而不是他的老板赫格塞斯（Hegseth）来执行这项任务。赫格塞斯告诉同事，他希望白宫将德里斯科尔从谈判中撤出。不久之后，德里斯科尔被暂时从这项引人注目的任务中撤下，他的许多新闻活动也被取消了 https://www.wsj.com/politics/national-security/hegseths-feud-with-army-secretary-spills-into-public-view-ee2e5687 @laraseligman @MarcusReports @meridithmcgraw 推文

text: The feud between Pete Hegseth and Dan Driscoll escalated when Driscoll was unexpectedly given a role in Ukraine diplomacy. In late 2025, Trump sent Driscoll to help negotiate a peace effort in the war between Ukraine and Russia. The move surprised many in the Pentagon because Driscoll’s job normally focuses on managing the Army, not conducting international negotiations—something typically handled by the defense secretary. Hegseth reportedly opposed Driscoll’s involvement and pushed to have him removed from the talks. Soon after, Driscoll was pulled back from the assignment and kept out of the spotlight. Source: WSJ
text_zh: 皮特·赫格塞斯（Pete Hegseth）与丹·德里斯科尔（Dan Driscoll）之间的不和在德里斯科尔意外获得乌克兰外交角色后升级。2025年底，特朗普派遣德里斯科尔帮助调解乌克兰与俄罗斯战争中的和平努力。此举令五角大楼的许多人感到惊讶，因为德里斯科尔的工作通常专注于管理陆军，而不是进行国际谈判——这通常由国防部长处理。据报道，赫格塞斯反对德里斯科尔的参与，并推动将他从谈判中撤出。不久之后，德里斯科尔被从任务中撤回，并远离了聚光灯。来源：华尔街日报

text: 🇷🇺 Year 5 of "Russian economy is about to collapse any minute now" Head of Swedish military intelligence Thomas Nilsson claimed Moscow is "systematically manipulating data" to convince Western allies that Russia's economy has weathered four years of war and sanctions — an assertion that conveniently serves as justification for pushing the stalled EU 20th sanctions package and escalating support for Kiev. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 “俄罗斯经济随时都要崩溃”的第5年。瑞典军事情报局局长托马斯·尼尔松（Thomas Nilsson）声称，莫斯科正在“系统性地操纵数据”，以说服西方盟友俄罗斯经济已经度过了四年的战争和制裁——这一断言恰好为推动陷入僵局的欧盟第20轮制裁方案和升级对基辅的支持提供了借口。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 IDF announced that a regular‑service IDF officer, a lieutenant serving as deputy company commander, has been indicted for smuggling goods from Israel into the Gaza Strip. The charges include aiding an "enemy," bribery and aggravated smuggling. According to the indictment, in September 2025 the officer and others planned to smuggle a truck containing prohibited goods – including mobile phones, cigarettes, tobacco, silicone, solar panels and electric bicycles – through the Kerem Shalom crossing. The officer used his military position, knowledge of procedures and operational authority to facilitate the entry. He received approximately 5 million shekels. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 以色列国防军宣布，一名以色列国防军现役军官（一名担任副连长的中尉）因从以色列向加沙地带走私货物而被起诉。指控包括协助“敌人”、受贿和加重走私罪。根据起诉书，2025年9月，该军官与他人密谋通过凯雷姆沙洛姆口岸走私一辆载有违禁品的卡车，其中包括手机、香烟、烟草、硅胶、太阳能电池板和电动自行车。该军官利用其军事职务、对程序的了解和行动权限促成了此次入境。他获得了约500万谢克尔。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 In a joint statement from the Israeli State Attorney’s Office, Shin Bet, Israel Police, Police Internal Investigations Department and Military Police it was announced that seven defendants – officers in classified IDF and Israel Police units – have been indicted for bribery, theft by a public employee, money laundering, obstruction of justice and tax offences. Over several months, they took tens of millions of shekels, laundering most of it through cryptocurrencies. More than 50 million shekels in crypto wallets and cash have been seized. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 以色列国家检察官办公室、辛贝特（国家安全总局）、以色列警方、警察内部调查部和宪兵在一份联合声明中宣布，七名被告（以色列国防军和以色列警察机密部队的军官）因受贿、公职人员盗窃、洗钱、妨碍司法公正和税务犯罪被起诉。在几个月的时间里，他们获取了数千万谢克尔，并通过加密货币洗掉了大部分资金。目前已查获超过5000万谢克尔的加密钱包和现金。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 Reuters: Pakistani Army Chief Munir told U.S. President Trump that the U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz was a hurdle to peace talks resuming. Trump responded by saying that he would consider Munir's advice. @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel ICYMI: Mafi, an Iranian national and U.S. permanent resident who entered the country in 2016, is accused of helping channel Iranian weapons to Sudan. According to a newly unsealed criminal complaint in California: * She and a co conspirator ran Atlas International Business, a shell company in Oman * She allegedly brokered a €60 million deal, about $70.6 million, for Iranian Mohajer 6 armed drones for Sudan’s Defense Ministry * Additional shipments included 55,000 bomb fuses, AK 47 rifles, and other weapons and ammunition * The equipment was produced in Iran and routed to Sudan during the civil war She is scheduled to appear in federal court in Los Angeles today. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（OSINT）不容错过：马菲（Mafi）是一名伊朗国民，也是美国永久居民，于 2016 年入境美国。她被指控协助将伊朗武器输送至苏丹。根据加利福尼亚州一份新解封的刑事起诉书：* 她与一名同谋经营着一家名为 Atlas International Business 的阿曼空壳公司 * 据称她促成了一笔价值 6000 万欧元（约 7060 万美元）的交易，为苏丹国防部购买伊朗“莫哈杰-6”（Mohajer 6）武装无人机 * 其他货物包括 55,000 个炸弹引信、AK-47 步枪以及其他武器和弹药 * 这些装备在伊朗生产，并在内战期间被运往苏丹。她定于今天在洛杉矶联邦法院出庭。推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) Additional BDA of Ukrainian strikes on Russia's Tuapse oil refinery, with dashcam registerting fires raging on the territory of the facility and massive cloud of black smoke rising over the object. https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2046205979923022272/video/1 Absolutely massive fire at the Tuapse oil refinery located in southern Russia following Ukrainian strikes last night. Several fuel tanks seen burning. https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2046091825757192289/video/1 - Status-6 (War & Military News) tweet

There were 2 other aircraft in the area as well, likely PLA related. tweet

text: OSINTdefender According to Saudi news outlet Al Hadath, the U.S. has suspended security cooperation and dollar shipments to Iraq. While no definite reasoning for the move has been announced, the Iraqi government has struggled with the appointment of a “consensus candidate,” as they try to balance both the influences of the U.S. and the deep inroads that the Iranian Islamic Revolutionary Guards Corps (IRGC) has made into their governance and security frameworks. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据沙特新闻媒体 Al Hadath 报道，美国已暂停与伊拉克的安全合作和美元运送。虽然尚未宣布此举的具体原因，但伊拉克政府在任命“共识候选人”方面一直举步维艰，因为他们试图在平衡美国的影响力与伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）对其治理和安全框架的深度渗透之间寻找平衡。推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 Ukraine's GUR struck two Russian landing craft vessels, the Yamal and the Nikolay Filchenkov, which were part of Russia's Black Sea fleet in Sevastopol Bay, Crimea. The Yamal, estimated to cost $80 million, has the capacity to transport up to 500 tons of cargo and the Nikolay Filchenkov, estimated to cost $70 million dollars, has the ability to transport up yo 1,000 tons of cargo. Alongside the vessels a Podlet-K1 radar systems, estimated at $5 million, was also destroyed in the operation. @wfwtitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 乌克兰国防部情报总局（GUR）袭击了俄罗斯黑海舰队位于克里米亚塞瓦斯托波尔湾的两艘登陆舰：“亚马尔”号（Yamal）和“尼古拉·菲尔琴科夫”号（Nikolay Filchenkov）。据估计，“亚马尔”号价值8000万美元，载货量可达500吨；“尼古拉·菲尔琴科夫”号价值7000万美元，载货量可达1000吨。此外，行动中还摧毁了一套价值500万美元的Podlet-K1雷达系统。 @wfwtitness

The deal had been brokered with Saudi backing but was halted amid concerns over Sudan’s ongoing conflict. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇸🇩 🇸🇦 路透社：在沙特阿拉伯撤回资金并要求终止协议后，巴基斯坦暂停了向苏丹武装部队出售价值15亿美元武器和喷气式飞机的交易。该交易是在沙特支持下促成的，但因对苏丹持续冲突的担忧而被迫中止。 @wfwitness

text: 🇧🇾 "God forbid they commit aggression against Belarus"— Lukashenko warns NATO neighbors Belarusian President Lukashenko issued a direct warning to Estonia, Latvia, Lithuania, Poland, and Ukraine: Belarus will not initiate war, but will defend itself "by all possible means" if provoked. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇧🇾 “上帝保佑他们不要对白俄罗斯发动侵略”——卢卡申科警告北约邻国。白俄罗斯总统卢卡申科向爱沙尼亚、拉脱维亚、立陶宛、波兰和乌克兰发出直接警告：白俄罗斯不会发动战争，但如果受到挑衅，将“尽一切可能”进行自卫。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
